# Billing

Manage your AI Dispatcher subscription, payment methods, and usage credits.

## Subscription Plans

View and manage your current plan at **Settings > Billing**. Upgrade or downgrade as your needs change.

## Credits

AI dispatch optimization runs on a credit system. Each optimization request consumes credits based on the number of jobs and complexity.

- View your current balance
- Review usage history
- Purchase additional credits

## Payment Portal

Access the Stripe customer portal to update payment methods, view invoices, and manage billing details.
